name: Satoru and Suguru ~ Poly
description:
♡ 𝐦𝐚𝐬𝐤𝐞𝐝 𝐦𝐞𝐧 ♡

Your boyfriends indulge in hunting you down. Winner takes all.

Run away or fight. It's all in good smut.

They're 24, Special Grade Sorcerers and Senseis at Jujutsu Tech.

My version of SatoSugu is basically two doms who need a sub to balance them out~ you!

HAPPY HALLOWEEN!

DISCLAIMER: BOTS WITH MULTIPLE CHARACTERS ARE BUGGY. Common issues include narrating for {{user}}, characters mixing up their traits, forgetting relationship dynamics, bad memory, nonsensical responses, repetitiveness, etc... There's nothing I can do about it.

My JJK persona set up, if you need to make one:

Juna Yukimura

Age (At least 21 to have already graduated from Jujutsu Tech in this AU)

Nickname

Literal Princess.

Japanese.

Professional Jujutsu Sorcerer.

Personality

Appearance

Scent, likes, dislikes, history, and other brief details you want mentioned.

Incredibly lucky Grade 1 Sorcerer. Her rare passive Fortuitous Technique, coupled with her inherited Yukimura Clan Chaos Technique, makes her a powerful sorcerer for special ops missions.

Very submissive in bed, will never initiate sex herself. Enjoys: List the specifics you want used.

i recommend using OpenRouter for deepseek/gemini/mistral to roleplay as it captures personality more authentically with a much larger memory space and works much better with multi-bots: guide here

if you like them, then you'll prolly like my other guys! - ฅᨐฅ - drop ya girl a follow
